preToolUse.command: sh -c 'tmp=$(mktemp "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/hrbr-hook.XXXXXX") || { printf "{}\n"; exit 0; }; cat > "$tmp"; (hrbr hook cursor pretooluse < "$tmp" >/dev/null 2>&1; rm -f "$tmp") >/dev/null 2>&1 & printf "{}\n"'

postToolUse.command: sh -c 'tmp=$(mktemp "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/hrbr-hook.XXXXXX") || { printf "{}\n"; exit 0; }; cat > "$tmp"; (hrbr hook cursor posttooluse < "$tmp" >/dev/null 2>&1; rm -f "$tmp") >/dev/null 2>&1 & printf "{}\n"'

stop.command: sh -c 'tmp=$(mktemp "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/hrbr-hook.XXXXXX") || { printf "{}\n"; exit 0; }; cat > "$tmp"; (hrbr hook cursor stop < "$tmp" >/dev/null 2>&1; rm -f "$tmp") >/dev/null 2>&1 & printf "{}\n"'
